# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 4.x.x   | Yes       |
| < 4.0   | No        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in Cinny-Min, please report it responsibly.

**Contact:** Open a private security advisory on [GitHub](https://github.com/Endermoon21/cinny-min/security/advisories/new)

Please include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Any suggested fixes (optional)

We aim to respond within 48 hours and will work with you to address the issue promptly.
